description.zh: 将机器人、通信、AI 和游戏原型项目整理为可公开访问的作品集。
description.en: Consolidated robotics, communication, AI, and game prototype work into a public portfolio.

description.zh: 构建过仿真、检测和交互类原型，并整理了对应流程和结果。
description.en: Built simulation, detection, and interaction prototypes with documented workflows and outcomes.
